response.justification: The candidate lacks the required C++ development experience on Windows systems (5–10 years) and domain expertise in Fixed Income, Investment Banking, or Capital Markets. While the resume shows strong software development skills across multiple languages and platforms, none of the roles explicitly mention C++, Windows development, or financial domain experience. The C++ experience is limited to one early role (National Instruments) involving C++ components, but not full-stack C++ development.
strengths: Strong software development fundamentals across multiple languages and platforms
Experience with low-latency applications and high-performance databases
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and community engagement
concerns: Insufficient C++ development experience on Windows systems (mandatory requirement)
No domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking
Lack of SQL Server/Oracle experience (mandatory requirement)
